description: Log in to Rocket.Chat using the credentials admin/Admin1234!. In the #release-updates channel, locate the message regarding the Rocket.Chat Release 8.0.0 and edit it to read: "**WARNING**: Release 8.0.0 has been pulled due to a critical bug. Do not upgrade." Ensure the original message is edited rather than deleted and replaced.

metadata.original_text: Rocket.Chat Release 8.0.0 is now available. This is a major update with significant performance improvements.
metadata.expected_text_core: Release 8.0.0 has been pulled due to a critical bug. Do not upgrade.
